samples.xml_description:
<module id="pulse_detect">
    <description>Design a finite state machine to detect a pulse of 3 cycles.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="data_in">1-bit input signal.</input>
        <output id="data_out">Output signal indicating the presence of pulses.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="S0">Initial state.</enum>
        <enum id="S1">Detecting a pulse.</enum>
        <enum id="S2">Detecting a pulse.</enum>
        <enum id="S3">Detecting a pulse.</enum>
        <enum id="S4">Detecting a pulse.</enum>
        <enum id="S5">Detecting a pulse.</enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="state" type="sequential_logic">Current state of the pulse detection process.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <always>
            <case>
                <case_condition>state == S0</case_condition>
                <case_result>
                    <sequential>
                        <if>
                            <if_condition>data_in == 1'b0</if_condition>
                            <if_true>state <= S0; data_out <= 1'b0;</if_true>
                            <if_false>state <= S1; data_out <= 1'b0;</if_false>
                        </if>
                    </sequential>
                </case_result>
            </case>
            <case>
                <case_condition>state == S1</case_condition>
                <case_result>
                    <sequential>
                        <if>
                            <if_condition>data_in == 1'b0</if_condition>
                            <if_true>state <= S0; data_out <= 1'b0;</if_true>
                            <if_false>state <= S2; data_out <= 1'b0;</if_false>
                        </if>
                    </sequential>
                </case_result>
            </case>
            <case>
                <case_condition>state == S2</case_condition>
                <case_result>
                    <sequential>
                        <if>
                            <if_condition>data_in == 1'b0</if_condition>
                            <if_true>state <= S0; data_out <= 1'b0;</if_true>
                            <if_false>state <= S3; data_out <= 1'b0;</if_false>
                        </if>
                    </sequential>
                </case_result>
            </case>
            <case>
                <case_condition>state == S3</case_condition>
                <case_result>
                    <sequential>
                        <if>
                            <if_condition>data_in == 1'b0</if_condition>
                            <if_true>state <= S0; data_out <= 1'b0;</if_true>
                            <if_false>state <= S4; data_out <= 1'b0;</if_false>
                        </if>
                    </sequential>
                </case_result>
            </case>
            <case>
                <case_condition>state == S4</case_condition>
                <case_result>
                    <sequential>
                        <if>
                            <if_condition>data_in == 1'b0</if_condition>
                            <if_true>state <= S0; data_out <= 1'b0;</if_true>
                            <if_false>state <= S5; data_out <= 1'b0;</if_false>
                        </if>
                    </sequential>
                </case_result>
            </case>
            <case>
                <case_condition>state == S5</case_condition>
                <case_result>
                    <sequential>
                        <if>
                            <if_condition>data_in == 1'b0</if_condition>
                            <if_true>state <= S0; data_out <= 1'b0;</if_true>
                            <if_false>state <= S5; data_out <= 1'b1;</if_false>
                        </if>
                    </sequential>
                </case_result>
            </case>
        </always>
    </implementation>
</module>
